title: Provider mark profiles
description: Per-provider catalog of mark geometry and payload type for SDK layout. mime_type is an array of IANA media types the carrier may return for that profile (e.g. PNG and/or PDF). Physical printing is the application’s concern—not modeled here. Profile size (width × height) is the nominal footprint in file unit.dimension (mm). Verify against live carrier output. Resolution order: graph.edges[product_id].mark_profile_by_zone[zone], then services[].mark_profile / mark_profile_by_zone, then products.mark_profile, then marks.default_profile.

dimension.description: Intrinsic size and layout coordinates use millimetres

default_profile.description: Profile id used when product.mark_profile is omitted

id.description: Stable profile id; referenced from products.mark_profile

mark_type.description: Must match product.mark_type for products using this profile

description.description: When to use this profile vs others

scope_notes.description: Optional: domestic vs international, registered, channel notes

size.description: Nominal width × height of the franking graphic in file unit.dimension (mm); optional until verified from API/spec

mime_type.description: IANA media types the provider API may return for this profile; order is not significant
